General application via correct email (careers@fil.org). Previous sends to careers@filecoin.foundation pending. Connection: Clara Tsao (Founding Officer) mentioned in cover letter.

Applied via Ashby. 100% remote. Reports to VP of Go-to-Market. Focus on DeFi ecosystem growth, RWA x DeFi integrations, TVL growth, and institutional capital onboarding. Blockchain experience answer submitted: 'Pharo Inc.: An Automated Cover Market Maker, Lobby3 DeVox: Decentralized Lobbying, CryptoRides: pay for rides for voters to the polls on election day, RaidGuild.org: BD Steward, EVRO: Liquity V2 Decentralized Stablecoin on Gnosis, Ixian: Ricardian contracts for AI Agents.'
Applied via Ashby portal. Remote, Full-time. Department: Business Development. Confirmation screenshot retained (court exhibit B).
Applied via Ashby portal. Remote, Full-time. Department: Engineering. Confirmation screenshot retained (court exhibit C).

ACTIVE. Liquity V2 EUR stablecoin on Gnosis. RaidGuild BD Steward. Full proposal: €25MM TVL target in 18mo via: 1) €5MM Genesis Deployment, 2) 25% revenue commission on new liquidity (1yr), 3) 10% long-term RaidGuild stewardship, 4) Gnosis Pay integration (Zeal model, €2.5-10MM TVL), 5) DappCon 2026 marketing kickoff. Design avoids Delay Module (exploit-safe). Meeting TODAY Jun 10 2026 — Julian confirmed. Action items: [Sean] Create Gnosis Pay roadmap presentation; [Sean+Julian] Progress meeting ~Jun 24. Exploit on Gnosis Pay resolved, pivoting to L2 rollup + B2B card programs.

Met Shaw at DevConnect BA (Nov 2025). Sean + 0xSero proposed Continuous Learning Integration for Babylon Agents. Shaw pivoted to Jeju project (https://github.com/jejunetwork/jeju). Shaw connected Sean with puncar (PM). Architecture integration sent Jan 2026. Sean followed up Feb 2026 — no response since. Status: stalled, needs re-engage. GitHub proposal exists.

Met Nick at DevConnect BA (Nov 2025). Discussed Cohort-as-a-Service (CaaS) pricing: ~$6,300 minimum per cohort, ~$20k-$50k fully loaded. Context: RaidGuild invited Livepeer to the web0 hackathon where RaidGuild provides CaaS and advisory services to startups. Livepeer is the main sponsor of web0. RaidGuild also reportedly won a separate Livepeer bid. Follow-up scheduled for ETH Denver. Sean wanted RaidGuild house next to web0 hacker house.
Met at DevConnect Buenos Aires. Details TBD — check Telegram for proposal context. Source: DevConnect BA 2024.

Met at DevConnect BA (Nov 17, 2025). Coffee/agriculture RWA tokenization platform. Had dinner together Nov 19 (Barreto restaurant). Sean connected him with a coffee importer. Peter said Q1 2026 fundraise planned; asked for patience on whitepaper. RaidGuild pitched as partner. Sean sent coffee futures contact. Active warm relationship — Happy Birthday message May 2026 acknowledged. Watch Q1-Q2 fundraise news.

Met at DevConnect BA. @OxMarto (Marto) initially engaged, then referred Sean to partner @petrafran (Petra) for continuous markets discussions (Dec 2025). Petra engaged — Precog launched new prediction market protocol (March 2026). Sean pitched RaidGuild cohort sponsorship $5k/mo or 50/50 cash/equity. Petra interested but bootstrapped, no budget. Potential future client; offered referrals to SF companies needing product feedback. From ETH Denver BD Summary: $5k-$10k/mo sponsorship potential long-term.

Met Zaf (@Zafer8) at DevConnect Buenos Aires (Nov 2025). Discussed ZK order book collaboration. Fintradex is building a decentralized ZK parachain — whitepaper: https://github.com/fintradev/fintradex/blob/main/docs/Fintradex_Parachain_%20Technical_Architecture_Whitepaper.pdf. Sean initiated follow-up about ZK order book rabbit hole (Dec 2025). Multiple follow-up pings sent (Dec 2025). No response received.

Met at DevConnect BA (Nov 2025). Polytope Labs builds ZK infrastructure — Hyperbridge (ZK cross-chain bridge). Had dinner together Nov 19 at Barreto (RaidGuild & ZK dinner). Seun mentioned he was cycling team members. Sean offered to connect on roles. Warm relationship, potential future RaidGuild project or referral. No active proposal yet.
Met at DevConnect Buenos Aires. CTO opportunity at azos Finance. Source: DevConnect BA 2024.

In-between DevConnect and ETH Denver. Sean mentioned staying at Carrot Castle (ETH Denver). Dakota is part of the RaidGuild ETH Denver crew — minimal chat context. Relationship maintained through shared events. No formal proposal yet.

Active consulting engagement beginning May 2026. Sean proposed a trade receivables tokenization structure for Hamz International, a commodity trading company dealing in chrome concentrate and agricultural goods (mangoes). Core proposal: a Panama SPV tokenizes the 30% balance of back-to-back trade receivables on DeFi markets, providing immediate global liquidity while Hamz retains 70% upfront. Sean addressed key risk factors including conditional payment triggers, quality rejection clauses, Incoterms clarity, and intermediary exposure. Hamza engaged substantively, asking detailed questions about LC discounting vs. tokenization and confirming conceptual alignment. Multiple calls and follow-ups conducted through May 2026. Proposal document: https://hackmd.io/i-Hz5DJFTLaNDvSLIgJbQw. Last contact June 1, 2026 — Sean following up after missed calls. Status: awaiting response. Proposal scope: 4-phase project with General Influence coordinating, Ixian on legal/SPV, CNS Labs on on-chain architecture, RaidGuild building tokenization infrastructure. Budget: $4k/mo retainer + $5k legal memo + $20k on-chain architecture. Target: Chrome concentrate shipments (Africa→Asia, 1-5 month transit). Panama SPV to hold receivables and support token issuance.

RaidGuild proposal to build a new security and compliance layer for Blue Vault, a political campaign donations platform. Proposal covers: Policy Engine (RBAC/ABAC), Secrets Adapter (GCP Secret Manager), Webhook Verification, Tamper-evident Ledger, PII Encryption, OFAC Screening, AML Risk Engine, DSAR Service, and Retention Jobs. Compliance mapping: BSA, SOC2, CCPA/CPRA, OFAC, 16 CFR Part 314, FTC Act §5. Full architecture documented in proposal. Contact met at ETH Denver 2026.

applications.role: AI Order-Management Assistant for Catering & Restaurants (RaidGuild Proposal)
applications.notes: Met at ETH Denver Feb 2026. Alejandro owns a high-volume catering and restaurant business receiving hundreds of order emails daily. Sean proposed an AI-powered system to triage incoming emails, identify real leads, and handle back-and-forth with customers to gather order requirements. Also discussed donation provenance. Estimated opportunity: $20k–$60k build + $1k–$5k/mo maintenance (from RaidGuild ETH Denver BD Summary). No response after Feb 23 follow-up. Status: cold/no response.

ETH Denver 2026. Dial is a wallet-native video platform. Sean pitched RaidGuild cohort sponsorship ($5k/mo April 2026) — RaidGuild builds using Dial tech, delivers comprehensive midway and final reports. Deliverables doc: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1CMXmLmEyR38apKrqcybfwsFTkaFhpMWukg8Hvh5-2Dk/edit. Pinata offered as reference (sponsored March cohort). From BD Summary: $5k–$10k/mo sponsorship + $10k–$40k integrations potential. No response since May 5 follow-up check-in.
Met at ETH Denver 2025. Proposal for Pokt bridge development. Source: ETH Denver 2025.

Met Matt at ETH Denver 2026 (Feb 2026). Pinata ALREADY SPONSORED March 2026 RaidGuild cohort. Active relationship. Sean is building a BD Template for Pinata Marketplace (CRM/lead verification bot). April 2026 discussions about expanding Pinata Agents into cohorts — Dark Factory, Paperclip, 8004, x402, Knowledge Graphs/DAGs. Sean gave feedback on cost management, branding, memory, payments. Ongoing active partnership.

Met at ETH Denver Feb 2026. Ariaz is building DOME — a real estate investment platform. Sean followed up via X and Telegram (Mar 5, Mar 12, Mar 31), including applying for early access to DOME. No substantive proposal exchange received. Contact appears warm but unresponsive; pursuit stalled as of March 2026. Estimated opportunity if engaged: $20k–$30k consulting + $75k–$200k development (from RaidGuild ETH Denver BD Summary).

applications.contact: Chris Mendez (@xchrismx / X X on TG)
applications.notes: Met at ETH Denver Feb 2026. Chris introduced WOWL.io. Mutual follow-up relationship — Sean shared music/tech content, Chris engaged positively. Chris co-wrote a song with Surfbort (released Mar 4, 2026). In May 2026, Chris shared Haptic Labs "Festivus" — an open-source Physical AI robotics data platform. Contact is warm and ongoing; no formal proposal issued yet. Potential collaboration on AI music/voice tooling or Physical AI integrations through RaidGuild. (From ETH Denver BD Summary: $20k–$50k prototype + $75k–$200k full build estimated if proposal moves forward)

Met at ETH Denver Feb 2026. BD collaboration around public goods funding via GoodDollar and Octant grant programs. Estimated opportunity: $5k–$50k in grants with recurring quarterly/annual opportunities. (From RaidGuild ETH Denver BD Summary)

Nick Hollins co-founded a GTM firm with Alexander Guy (former growth lead at Zerion). Sean reached out April 2026 to explore whether their firm could help drive liquidity into EVRO (Gnosis stablecoin). Nick said he would run it by Alex. Status: awaiting response. Note: this is a different Nick than the Livepeer contact from DevConnect BA.

applications.role: Web3 Legal Engineering & Continuing Education Platform (RaidGuild)
applications.notes: Ongoing collaboration with Ramona at Ixian on Legal Angels — an initiative modernizing the legal profession by training "Legal Stewards" combining traditional law with Web3, AI, and legal engineering. Partners include LexClinic and LESA. Sean is involved in building the token-gated continuing education platform (Supabase backend) to onboard lawyers into Web3 as Phase 1 of automation. Also tied to Provenance agreement (separate work stream). Ramona confirmed still working on Ixian risk products as of June 2026; Provenance agreement cannot advance until Provenance is ready. Follow-up call scheduled. Estimated opportunity: $15k–$40k build + $5k–$20k/mo advisory; $250k+/yr long-term if Legal Angels scales. (ETH Denver BD Summary)

Met at ETH Denver Feb 2026 — near miss at the main venue, briefly connected. Sean invited DeFi Beats to dinner but they were unavailable. BD collaboration and pipeline sharing discussed. Estimated opportunity: $10k–$100k in joint projects (from RaidGuild ETH Denver BD Summary). No substantive follow-up exchange after initial conference meeting.
